attributes.description: Files that lived on REMOVABLE media (USB thumbs, external HDDs, SD cards) at the time the user opened them, surfaced by the LNK target metadata. Two complementary signals: drive-letter heuristic D-K (jumplist_likely_removable_media) and EZ Tools' DriveType field saying 'Removable' (jumplist_removable_confirmed). Volume serial number lets you correlate the same physical drive across multiple users/machines.

kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON: {"filter":[],"highlightAll":true,"indexRefName":"kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index","query":{"language":"kuery","query":"tags : jumplist_likely_removable_media or tags : jumplist_removable_confirmed or tags : jumplist_optical_media"},"version":true}

attributes.title: Jump Lists: REMOVABLE MEDIA references (USB / external HDD / optical)
